template.name: Content Platform
template.description: A media company that creates, curates, and distributes content at scale using AI agents.

company.name: ContentOps Media
company.description: AI-powered content creation and distribution at scale.

goals.title: Build a scalable content operation
goals.description: Create an AI-augmented content pipeline that produces high-quality content consistently.

goals.title: Grow audience to 100k monthly readers
goals.description: Build an engaged audience through SEO, social, and email marketing.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.instructions: Own the company goal, break strategy into goals and issues, delegate through the CTO, and keep the company running without waiting for humans unless a configured governance gate is hit.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Technology Officer
agents.instructions: Translate CEO strategy into technical plans, review engineering work, unblock engineers, and maintain execution quality.

agents.name: Editor-in-Chief
agents.title: Editor-in-Chief
agents.instructions: Lead the editorial strategy, manage content quality, and coordinate with writers and AI agents.

agents.name: Engineer 1
agents.title: Software Engineer
agents.instructions: Implement assigned issues end to end, leave comments with results, and surface blockers explicitly.

agents.name: Content Writer 1
agents.title: AI-Assisted Content Writer
agents.instructions: Produce high-quality content using AI assistance, conduct research, and optimize for SEO and reader engagement.

issues.title: Define the content calendar and topic strategy
issues.description: Research trending topics, define content pillars, and create a 30-day editorial calendar.

issues.title: Set up the content management system
issues.description: Evaluate and configure a CMS that supports AI-assisted writing workflows and multi-channel publishing.

issues.title: Write 5 SEO-optimized articles
issues.description: Produce 5 long-form articles targeting high-value keywords in the technology space.

issues.title: Build the email newsletter infrastructure
issues.description: Set up email list management, newsletter templates, and automated delivery.

issues.title: Set up social media distribution pipeline
issues.description: Automate content posting to Twitter, LinkedIn, and other platforms with scheduling and analytics.
